titleStmt.title: SII 27.359: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 359. (A.R. No. 327 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the inner prākāra of the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.
This record registers a gift of land by Kuchchupāḍi, son of Mādāḍi Toḷaha to the temple of Mahādēva for feeding a Brāhmaṇa therein. It was made during the period of Nāgañcha Toḷaha and Bemmaṇañcha.

It is dated Śaka 135[6], Siddhārthi, Āśvija śu. 5, Tuesday. These details are somewhat irregular. The Saka and the cyclic years do not tally. If, however, the cyclic year is a mistake for Ānanda the other given details regularly correspond with 1434 A.D., September 7, Tuesday, f.d.t. ·02. This appears to be the intended date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga sirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya naga
rāraṁbha mulastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayādbudaya sakavaruśa 1356neya
siddhārthi saṁvatsarada Āśvija śu 5 maṁ śrīmatu nāgaṁca toḷaharu janama
nāḷuva kāladalū beṁmaṇaṁcara kāladalū madāḍi toḷaharamaga kocupāḍi mā
ḍida dharmada bāḷa vivara hosavūravoḷage kāṟiya beṭṭeṁba bayalagadeya catu
sīmeya vivara mūḍalu saṁkarabāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu saṁkara bā
hiriya malagadeyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu maṁgalūra bāyiriyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu ba
ḍagalu hoḷeyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī nāku catusīmeyiṁda voḷage bittuva bede ga
ṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu 3 mūḍigade bāṁkaneṁba yekkaya catusīmeya vivara mūḍa
lu bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu saṁkara bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁ
da baḍagalu paḍuvalu gōviṁda bāyiri beḷila bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda mū
ḍalu baḍagalu bānabāyiri Ūrāḷa bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī
nālku catusīmeyoḷage bittuva bede gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalū 1 hā 10 ne bāḷa
neṁba mekkeyamēlaṇa teṁka kaḍiya mekkeya hāḷi biḷala mekkeya ca
tu sīmeya vivara mūḍalu kēsa bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁka
lu he riya viṣṇubāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu bā
yiriya gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍaga maribāyiriyara gaḍiyiṁda
lu yiṁtī nāku catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuva mekkeya hāḷi 20 ma
bāṁkaneṁba mekkeya teṁka kaḍeya mane ṭhāvina catusīmeya viva
ra mūḍalu saṁkara bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu he riya viṣṇu bā
yiriya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu beḷilu bāyiriya gaḍiyiṁda
mūḍalu baḍagalu bāṁkanagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīme
yiṁda voḷaguḷa hakkalu haḍumana ṭhāu sahita bayalu mekke bittuva
gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu 5 hā 30 ne bituva bāḷanu sūrāla mahādēva
rige kuccupāḍi dhārāpūrvakavāgi pāṇivēṭhadali mūlavaneṟadanu yi bā
ḷina [mēle Oba] brāhmaṇa bhōjanake naḍasi baha Akki dēvara hāneyali nāgaṁḍu
gadalū yaki hattumūḍe Akkiyanu kālakālake naḍasi bahadu yi
bāḷiṁge teṟa
neya bāḷikege baḍḍiya yettu baliya bhāga Anāyasanāya Aludūyi
llamēlādudu sarvamāṁnya yi bāḷanu hosalūra kruṣṇa bāyiriya maga saṁkara
bāyirige koccupāḍi nāyaru mūlavakoṭa saṁkarabāyiriya bāḷa
sageya yillade hattumūḍe yakkiyanu mahādēvarige dharṁ
mmakke naḍasi bāḷuvanu yi Akkiya naḍasu tirade hāyide hōdare
bāyirige yi bāḷa nāyaru mūlada saṁmaṁdhavilla mattaṁ śaṁkha
ra bāhirige kocupāḍi nāyaru mulava koṭa bāḷina ma ṇiya tiṁgaḷiṁge 3 pa ba
naḍava Akki muḍe 1 Aṁtu Ā bāḷa mēle haṁnoṁdumūḍe Akkiyanu naḍasi baharu
bāḷiṁge teṟu Osaga Anāyaka sanāyaka yese biḍāra Avadu yilla sarvamāṁnyaveṁda nā
gaṁca toḷaharu beṁmaṁṇaṁcaru māḍidaṁthā mānya yi śāsanake toḷaharu beṁmaṇatoḷa
hara Oppa śrīmahādēvara Oppa Oppa mahādēvaru dānapālanayō
rmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānātsarggamavāpnōti pālanādacutaṁ padaṁ
śrī mahādēvaru śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.359 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
